settings.question: When will my order ship?
settings.answer: Orders are dispatched within 24 hours. You'll receive a tracking number by email once it ships.

settings.question: Where do I find my tracking number?
settings.answer: It's in your shipping confirmation email. Paste it in the field above to see live status.

settings.question: My tracking isn't updating — what now?
settings.answer: Carriers can take 24–48 hours to scan a parcel after dispatch. If it stays stuck, contact us and we'll chase it for you.

settings.heading: Track your order
settings.subheading: Enter your tracking number to see the latest delivery status.
settings.steps: Ordered::We received it | Packed::Prepared with care | Shipped::On the way | Delivered::Enjoy
